sanskrit:
गतसङ्गस्य मुक्तस्य ज्ञानावस्थितचेतसः।
यज्ञायाचरतः कर्म समग्रं प्रविलीयते॥
transliteration:
gata-saṅgasya muktasya jñānāvasthita-cetasaḥ |
yajñāyācarataḥ karma samagraṃ pravilīyate ||
literal_meaning: Of one gone-beyond-attachment, freed, whose mind is established in knowledge—his actions performed as sacrifice dissolve entirely.
contextual_meaning: When identity is no longer glued to outcomes or roles, every act becomes an offering; the psychological residue of ‘doing’ vanishes, leaving only spontaneous, stress-free engagement.
psychological_state: Flow-state: action without anxious self-monitoring; ego-neutral performance.
trigger_scenario: A surgeon in a complex 8-hour operation who forgets time, hunger, and reputation—skills operate, ego recedes.
anchor_text: Work as an offering, let go of results, and feel the action complete itself.
